methods.name: GetLocalizationFile(String)
methods.summary: Retrieves localization file from configured environment

methods.name: GetLocalizationFile(String, String)
methods.signature: public static string GetLocalizationFile(string subPath, string messageFile)
methods.summary: Retrieves localization file from configured environment

params.name: subPath
params.doc: Possible sub folder of message file. Empty sub folder has no effect.

properties.name: BinFolder
properties.summary: Gets Path to Tekla Structures binary (bin) directory.

properties.name: EnvBaseFolder
properties.summary: Gets Path to Tekla Structures XSDATADIR directory. XSDATADIR is defined in the teklastructures.ini file. It points to a location, where the installation installs the environment files and folders. Example: C:\ProgramData\Trimble\Tekla Structures\Version

properties.name: InstallFolder
properties.summary: Gets path to Tekla Structures installation directory.

properties.name: MessageFolder
properties.summary: Gets path to Tekla Structures messages directory.

properties.name: MessagesFolder
properties.summary: Gets a list Paths to Tekla Structures messages directories.
